auth.codeSentTo: Koodh 6 nambar ah ayaan u dirnay {{email}}

promotion.title: Xayeysiiskaaga Kor u Qaad
promotion.subtitle: Iibsadayaal badan gaar oo dhakhso badan ku iibi xoojinta tooska ah.
promotion.mpesaHint: Lambar aad ka bixin doonto geli. Nidaamkayagu si toos ah ayuu lacag bixinta uga ogaadaa STK Push.
promotion.proceedPayment: Lacag Bixinta Tooska ah u Gudub
promotion.manualPayment: Lacag Bixin Gacanta ah Ayaa Loo Baahan Yahay
promotion.manualPaymentDesc: Si aad xayeysiiskaaga ugu kor qaaddo Muqdisho & magaalooyinka weyn, fadlan soo wac oo lacagta u dir lambarka hoose:
promotion.step1: Codsiga lacag bixinta taleefankaaga ayuu ka muuqday
promotion.step2: PIN-kaaga M-Pesa geli si aad u xaqiijiso
promotion.step3: Shaashaddan si otomaatig ah ayay iskii u cusboonaysiin doontaa 🎉
promotion.waitingConfirmation: Xaqiijinta lacag bixintaada ayaa la sugayaa…
promotion.paymentSuccess: Xayeysiiskaaga si guul ah ayaa loo kor-qaadey. Muuqaalka dheeraadka ah ku farax!

overview.becomeVerifiedDesc: Gadeeyayaasha la xaqiijiyay waxay helaan astaan gaar ah, goobaha raadinta ka sareeyan, isla markaana kalsoonida dheeri ah ee musharriyayaasha waxay dhisaan.
overview.tip1: Isticmaal sawiro cad oo tayo sare leh

myads.deleteDesc: Ficilkan lama beddeli karo. Dhammaan aragtida iyo hogaamintu waa lumayaan.
myads.noAdsDesc: Wax iibinta aad ku sheegay ma gelinin. Hadda bilow oo lacag samee!
myads.premiumDesc: Xayeysiisyada la xoojiyay waxay helaan gaadh 10x dheeri ah iyo farriimaad 5x badan.

settings.savedSuccess: Isbeddeladu si guul leh ayay ugu keydeen!
settings.securityDesc: Furaha sirta iyo amnigu akoonkaaga maamul
settings.lastChanged: Markii ugu dambeysay la beddelay: lama garanayno
settings.staySafeDesc: Ha la wadaagin eraygaaga sirta ama OTP qof kasta. Suqafuran weligeed kuma weydiin doonto xogta akoonkaaga.
settings.deleteAccountSubtitle: Akoonkaaga Suqafuran iyo dhammaan xogta la xiriirta si joogto ah u tirtir.
settings.deleteAccountWillDelete: Waxa si joogto ah loo tirtiri doono
settings.deleteAccountItem1: Profaylkaaga akoonka (magaca, iimeelka, lambarka taleefanka, sawirka profaylka)
settings.deleteAccountItem2: Dhammaan xayeysiisyada iyo sawirrada la soo geliyay
settings.deleteAccountRetentionDesc: Akoonkaagu si joogto ah ayuu si degdeg ah u tirtirmayaa. Qaar ka mid ah diiwaanada macaamilada la magacdhigay ayaa la hayn kara ilaa
settings.deleteAccountRetentionReason: si sharci iyo xadgudubka lacagta loogu hortago.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmBold: mid joogto ah oo aan soo laaban karin
settings.deleteAccountConfirmEnd: . Dhammaan xogteydii si degdeg ah ayay tirtirmaysaa.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmBtn: Akoonkaygii Si Joogto ah u Tirtir
settings.deleteAccountSuccessDesc: Akoonkaaga iyo dhammaan xogta la xiriirta si joogto ah ayay u tirtireen.
settings.deleteAccountSignInRequired: Soo gal si aad akoonka u tirbirto
settings.deleteAccountSignInDesc: Waa in aad soo gasho si aad si joogto ah u tirbirto akoonkaaga.
settings.deleteAccountError: Akoonka tirtirida ayaa ku guuldaraysatay. Fadlan mar kale isku day ama la xiriir support@suqafuran.com.

messages.loginToView: Waa inaad galaysaa si aad farriimaad u diri iyo u helid.

messages.toDiscuss: si aad ka hadashid ama wax u iibisid

search.tipText: Si gaar ah u sheeg. Halkii aad "baabuur" ku qori lahayd, isku day "Toyota Corolla 2015" natiijooyinka ka wanaagsan.

favorites.title: Xayeysiisyada Kaydsan
favorites.subtitle: Alaabta aad xiisaynayso la soco.
favorites.noFavorites: Wali xayeysiis la kaydsan ma jiraan
favorites.noFavoritesDesc: Astaanta wadnaha gujiso xayeysiis kasta si aad halkan u kaydiso.

help.title: Xarunta Caawimaada
help.subtitle: Jawaabaha su'aalahaga ka hel
help.noResultsDesc: Ma heli karno wax ku haboon raadintaada
help.heroSubtitle: Jawaabaha su'aalaha caadiga ah ee ku saabsan iibsashada, iibinta, iyo ammaanka Suqafuran ka hel.
help.faqBuy1A: Iibsashadu waa fudud! Xayeysiisyada baadh ama raadi, guji mid aad jeceshahay, oo isticmaal badhanka "Sheeko" ama "Lambarka Muuji" si aad gadeeyaha toos ula xiriirto. Mar walba meel caafimaad leh oo dadweyne ah ku kulmow si aad shayga u hubeysid ka hor intaadan bixin.
help.faqBuy2A: Gadaayaasha badankood waxay u furan yihiin qiimeyaasha. Qiimaha waxaad kala hadli kartaa gadeeyaha iyada oo loo marayo sheekada barnaamijka gudihiisa ama adigoo u wacaya. Raadso calaamada "La Xaajoodsanayaa" ee xayeysiisyada.
help.faqSell1A: Dhagsii badhanka "Xayeysiis Cusub Geli" ee xaafaddaada ama badhanka "Hadda Iib" ee madaxa. Qaybta dooro, sawiro cad soo geli, cinwaan iyo qiime sharraxaad leh ku dar, ka dibna guji "Xayeysiiska Geli". Bilaash buu yahay!
help.faqSell2A: Si dhakhso ah u iibiso: 1. Sawiro tayo sare leh isticmaal. 2. Sharaxaad faahfaahsan qor. 3. Qiime xaq ah oo tartamaya ku dhig. 4. Noqo "Gadeeyaha La Xaqiijiyay" si aad kalsoonida dheeri ah musharriyayaasha ula dhisid.
help.faqSafety1A: Ammaanku waa mudnaanteena. Mar walba meelaha dadweyne (sida xarumaha ganacsi ama kafeeha) ku kulmow, lacag ha u dirin ka hor intaadan shayga arkayn, oo nafsigaaga raac. Haddii heshiis aad u fiican u muuqdo si ay run u tahay, inta badan dhab ma ahan.
help.faqSafety2Q: Barnaamijka Gadeeyaha La Xaqiijiyay waa maxay?
help.faqSafety2A: Barnaamijkeena Gadeeyaha La Xaqiijiyay wuxuu astaan u siiyaa gadaayaasha warqadda aqoonsiga rasmiga ah soo gudbiyay. Tani waxay musharriyayaasha ka caawisaa inay xulafada la aaminsan yihiin. Xaqiijinta waad codsan kartaa goobaha akoonkaaga.
help.faqAccount1A: Tag "Goobaha Akoonka" ee barra dhinaca xaafaddaada. Qaybta "Amniga", waxaad cusbooneysiin kartaa eraygaaga sirta oo maamusho xidhmadaada firfircoon.
help.faqAccount2Q: Eraygayga sirta waan ilowday, maxaan sameeyaa?
help.faqAccount2A: Bogga galitaanka, guji "Eraygii Sirta Ilowday?". Ciwaankaaga iimeelka geli, oo xiriir ammaan ah ayaan kuu diri doonnaa si aad dib u dejiso.

notifications.title: Ogeysiisyada
notifications.subtitle: Xaaladda akoonkaaga la soco.
notifications.noNotifications: Xili ogeysiis cusub ma jiraan. Wax muhiim ah marka ay dhacaan ayaan ku xaqiijin doonaa.

wallet.redeemCodeDesc: Koodhkaaga 8-xarfood ah geli si aad si otomaatig ah lacag ugu darsato walledkaaga.

agent.promotionManagementDesc: Codsiyada eeg, koodhada samee, oo xayeysiisyada kor u qaadida ku dabaq.

verify.title: Xaqiijinta Gadeeyaha
verify.subtitle: Aqoonsigaaga xaqiiji si aad Suqafuran ku bilowdo xayeysiisyo gelida
verify.alreadyVerifiedDesc: Akoonkaaga waa la xaqiijiyay. Si xor ah ayaad xayeysiisyo geli kartaa.
verify.underReview: Xaqiijintu Waa La Dib u Eegayaa
verify.underReviewDesc: Warqadahaada waa la dib u eegayaa. Caadiga ahaan 24-48 saacadood ayaa qaadata.
verify.rejectedDesc: Codsigaagii hore waa la diiday. Warqado cad oo la arki karo dib u soo geli.
verify.submittedDesc: Warqadahaaga waxaan dib u eegi doonaa oo 24-48 saacadood gudahood ku war celinay doonnaa.
verify.submissionFailed: Soo gudbintu way fashilmay. Dib u isku day.
verify.uploadBothSides: Labada dhinac soo geli hadduu khuseeyo (hore & dib)
verify.selfieDesc: Sawir cad oo wejikaaga haysta aqoonsigaaga
verify.tapToRetake: Dhagsii si aad dib u qaadato
verify.clickToTakeUpload: Guji si aad sawirka nafta u qaadato / soo geliso
verify.reason1: Waa inaad xaqiijisaa si aad Suqafuran ku geli kartid xayeysiisyo
verify.reason2: Musharriyayaasha kalsoonida la dhis oo iibka koror
verify.reason3: Calaamad la xaqiijiyay hel profaylkaaga iyo xayeysiisyadaada
verify.reason4: Qorshayaasha xayeysiiska heer sare ah fur

boost.tenXReach: Gaadh 10x dheeri ah oo la damaanqaaday

followers.title: Raaciyayaasha
followers.subtitle: Maamul isticmaalayaasha raacaya cusbooneysiinahaaga.
followers.noFollowersDesc: Dadka aad xayeysiis fiican u daabacdo ayaa kuu raaci doona.

feedback.title: Faalladaada
feedback.subtitle: Daawo waxa iibsadayaashu iyo iibiyayaashu kugula hadlayaan.
feedback.noReviewsDesc: Macaamilada dhammaystir si aad sumcaddaada Suqafuran ku dhisid.

performance.title: Waxqabadka Suuqa
performance.subtitle: Falanqee sida xayeysiisyada iyo profaylkaaga u shaqaynayaan.
performance.comingSoon: Waxaan dhammaynayaa nidaamka la socoshada waxqabadka. Dhawaan aad ayaad u arki kartaa isbeddelada saacad kasta.

proSales.heroDesc: Ku biir Suqafuran Pro oo hel qaladaadka heerka ganacsiga ee loo baahan yahay si aad ganacsigaaga u kobcisid. Iibiyayaasha xirfadlaha ah ayaa ilaa 5x dhakhso ah u iibiya.
proSales.prioritySupportDesc: Ka hel jawaabaha kooxda taageerada dhakhso badan.
proSales.boostedVisibilityDesc: Xayeysiisyadaadu 10x sii badan ayay ku muuqdaan natiijooyinka raadinta.
proSales.advancedAnalyticsDesc: Si qoto dheer ugu gal xog-ururinada iibsadayaashaada.
proSales.manageSubscriptionsDesc: Xoojinnada firfircoon, cusboonaysiinahaaga rukhsadda, iyo taariikhda lacag bixinta mid meel ah ka hel.

sellerProfile.notFoundDesc: Xogta isticmaalaha aad raadinayso ma jirto.

premium.heroDesc: Adeegyada premium ee Suqafuran xayeysiisyadaada muuqaal ay mudan yihiin siiya. Iibiyayaasha xirfadlayaashu adeegyadeena xoojinta ku iibiyaan ilaa 100x dhakhso badan.
premium.payWithMpesa: M-Pesa (Lipana) ku bixi — Hawlgalka isla markiiba kadib lacag bixinta.
premium.whyBoostDesc: Malaayiin isticmaaleyaasha ka mid ah Geeska Afrika, liistadaadu dhex lummi kartaa kumanaan xayeysiis saacadkasta la daabica. Xoojintu waxay kugu dhigtaa mowqifka.
premium.instantActivationDesc: Xoojintaada waxay nool tahay isla markiiba kadib xaqiijinta lacag bixinta M-Pesa.
premium.performanceTrackingDesc: Arag sida dhabta ah inta aragti iyo gujiyada dheeraadka ah ee xoojintaadu soo saarto.

delivery.title: Keenida Suqafuran
delivery.subtitle: Dalabyadaada iyo xaaladda dhoofinta si toos ah ka raadso.
delivery.noDeliveriesDesc: Shayada aad iibsato ama iibiso Keenida Suqafuran waxay halkan ka muuqan doonaan.

terms.title: Shuruudaha & Xaaladaha
terms.subtitle: Fadlan shuruudahan si taxadar leh u akhri intaadan Suqafuran isticmaalin. Barnaamijka gelitaanka ama isticmaalka, waxaad ogolaanaysaa shuruudahaan.
terms.questionsDesc: Haddaad su'aalo qabto ama caddayn u baahan tahay shuruudahaan, fadlan kooxda taageerada nala soo xiriir.

privacy.title: Siyaasadda Xogta Gaarka
privacy.subtitle: Waxaan u heellan nahay ilaalinta macluumaadkaaga shakhsiga ah iyo xuquuqdaada xogta.
privacy.questionsDesc: Haddaad su'aalo, codsiyada, ama walaacyo ku saabsan Siyaasaddan Xogta Gaarka ama sida aan xogta gaarka kugu maamuleyno qabto, nala soo xiriir.

about.mission: Hadafkayagu waa Inaan Afrika Ganacsiga ku Xidno
about.missionDesc: Suqafuran waxaa ka badan suuq. Waa bulshooyin ay kulmaan kalsoonida iyo tknoolajiyada.
about.trustDesc: Aad ayaan ugu maalgalinaa amniga iyo xaqiijinta si aan u hubinno in ganacsiyada oo dhammu ay xaqiijisan yihiin.
about.velocityDesc: Barnaamijkayagu si dhakhso ah ayuu u adeegaa, kaa cawinaya inaad shayagaaga wakhtiga gaaban ka iibiso.
about.communityDesc: Ganacsiyada maxalliga ah iyo shakhsiyaadka waxaan u awoodi naa inay maalin walba macaamiil badan gaaraan.
about.builtForAfrica: Afrika loogu dhisay, dadka daryeelka leh
about.teamDesc: Kooxdayadu waxay ka kooban tahay injineero, naqshadeyeyaal, iyo khubarrada taageerada macaamiisha ee xallinta caqabadaha gaarka ah ee suuqa Afrikaanka u gaar ah u heellan.

safety.title: Xogta Amniga Mudnaanteeda Weyn
safety.subtitle: Haga fudud ee xaqiijiya khibrad ganacsiga ammaan ah ee Suqafuran.
safety.meetInPublicDesc: Had iyo goor iibiyaha ama iibsadaha ku kulmaa goob dadweyne oo iftiiman, mashquul badan sida xarunta ganacsiga ama saldhiga booliiska.
safety.inspectItemDesc: Ha lacag bixin intaadan arag oo adigu tijaabinin shayga. Hawlgalka iyo xaaladda hubi.
safety.payOnDeliveryDesc: Lacag hormar ah M-Pesa ama xawaaladda bangiga u dirin. Kaliya ka bixi kadib markaad shayga heshay.
safety.useSecureChatDesc: Xiriirka oo dhan gudaha sheekada Suqafuran ku hay si aad u leedahay diiwaanka sheekadaada.
safety.reportScamTitle: Khiyaano Aragtay? Isla Markiiba Soo Gudbi!
safety.reportScamDesc: Kooxda xakameynta waxay 24/7 shaqeysaa liistada shakiga leh in laga saaro. Haddii xayeysiis aad u fiican inuu run yahay u muuqdo, baa la yaab. Naga caawi Suqafuran ammaannaa ku hayno adigoo soo gudbinaya dhaqanka shakiga leh.
safety.scam1: Qiimayaal been ah oo aad u hooseeya shayga tayada sare leh.
safety.scam2: Iibiyayaal diidan in ay shakhsiyaad ku kulmaan.
safety.scam3: Codsiyada lacagta hore ama kharashyada dhoofinta.
safety.scam4: Iibiyayaal macluumaadka shakhsiga sida erayada sirta ama OTP-yada weydiiya.

onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Dhawr kun oo xayeysiis ka raadi — korontada, moodada, baabuurta, alaabta guriga, iyo wax badan.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Xayeysiis ku soo geli laba daqiiqo gudahood. Sawirro soo geli, qiime u dhig, iibsadayaasha la gaadhso.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: Gadeeyayaasha xaqiijsan, dhibcaha aaminsan iyo ilaalinta iibsadaha — si aad kalsooni ku ganacsato.
